name: Que - Alien Researcher
description:
-Questionable Intro-

Que isnt from Earth, she's actually from quite far away. And now you've been put at at a Mars research outpost, alone with her big freaky eyes...

Feedback and reviews are greatly appreciated! And don't forget my discord!

Art by Lenyavok (Twitter: NSFW | SFW Bluesky: NSFW | SFW). Character in art is Snickers. Bot and character interpretation by me.
